headline: A Look At VICI Properties (VICI) Valuation As Earnings Expectations And Estimates Improve
summary: Investor focus on VICI Properties (VICI) has intensified ahead of its upcoming earnings report, as expectations for higher EPS and revenue and recent estimate revisions set the backdrop for reassessing the stock’s risk and return profile. See our latest analysis for VICI Properties. At a share price of US$29.01, VICI has logged a 1 month share price return of 8.13% and a year to date share price return of 3.06%.
